## What this changes

## If this adds or changes data

- [ ] I described the input corpus (count, source, resolution)
- [ ] Compression comparisons hold perceptual quality constant (SSIM vs a lossless master)
- [ ] External figures are cited

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check` passes on any script I changed
- [ ] Charts regenerated if the underlying CSVs changed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
